title: 菊花賞の後に・ゴールはまだ先！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio has the time of her life running in the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she hides away and cries over not being
able to realize her dream of becoming a Triple
Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even through the tears, however, she recognises
her own growth during her classic year. Her mood
quickly brightens, and we decide on her next race
goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho. Thus begins Tokai Teio's
new journey.
